step_rationale: ECM proteolysis and fibrous cap degradation; atherosclerotic plaque rupture mediator.
mechanism: Matrix metalloproteinase-1 degrades fibrous cap collagen and extracellular matrix, triggering atherosclerotic plaque rupture and thrombus exposure.

references.title: Meta-Analysis of Extracellular Matrix Dynamics after Myocardial Infarction Using RNA-Sequencing Transcriptomic Database.
Relation of baseline plasma MMP-1 levels to long-term all-cause mortality in patients with known or suspected coronary artery disease referred for coronary angiography.
[Matrix metalloproteinase-1 and coronary atheroslerotic plaque rupture].
references.journal: Zhonghua bing li xue za zhi = Chinese journal of pathology
